user.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
user.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials.

You need an active **IoT Core** and **Smart Lock Open Service** subscription on [iot.tuya.com](https://iot.tuya.com).

select_device.title: Select Lock Device
select_device.description: Choose the lock device you want to control from Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Access ID and Access Secret on iot.tuya.com.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tuya Cloud API. Check your network and region.
error.remote_unlock_disabled: Remote unlock is not enabled on this device. Enable it in the Tuya or Smart Life app first.

abort.no_devices_found: No lock devices found. Make sure your Smart Life / Tuya app account is linked to your IoT project and your device is a supported lock category.
abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tuya Cloud API. Check your network and try again.

create_temp_password.name: Create temporary password
create_temp_password.description: Creates a temporary unlock code on the lock.

name.name: Name
name.description: A label for this password (e.g. guest name).

duration_hours.name: Duration (hours)
duration_hours.description: How many hours the code stays valid.

get_dynamic_password.name: Get dynamic password
get_dynamic_password.description: Gets a short-lived dynamic password (valid ~5 minutes). Works even if the lock is offline.

delete_temp_password.name: Delete temporary password
delete_temp_password.description: Deletes a temporary password from the lock.

password_id.name: Password ID
password_id.description: The password_id shown in the temporary passwords sensor's attributes.

freeze_temp_password.name: Freeze temporary password
freeze_temp_password.description: Freezes a temporary password without deleting it (Zigbee locks only).

password_id.name: Password ID
password_id.description: The password_id shown in the temporary passwords sensor's attributes.

unfreeze_temp_password.name: Unfreeze temporary password
unfreeze_temp_password.description: Reactivates a previously frozen temporary password (Zigbee locks only).

password_id.name: Password ID
password_id.description: The password_id shown in the temporary passwords sensor's attributes.
